title: neottia bigelowii
intro: Neottia bigelowii, also known as Bigelow's ladies' tresses, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Neottia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neottia bigelowii include its ability to relieve respiratory tract congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Neottia bigelowii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
